test_cases.description: Start server with Stdio transport succeeds when all preconditions met
test_cases.expected_output_description: Server starts and listens on stdio

test_cases.description: Start server with HttpSse transport and valid TLS succeeds
test_cases.input_description: Valid McpServerConfig with HttpSse transport and valid TLS cert/key
test_cases.expected_output_description: Server starts and listens on configured address with TLS

test_cases.description: Start server fails when vault is unreachable
Start server with HttpSse fails when TLS cert is invalid
Start server fails with invalid config values
Start server fails when cannot bind to address
Provision session with valid OAuth request succeeds
test_cases.input_description: Valid OAuthProvisionRequest with S256 PKCE and valid Ed25519 key
test_cases.expected_output_description: OAuthProvisionResponse with session_id, expires_at, granted_scopes subset of requested

test_cases.description: Provision session fails with invalid Ed25519 public key
Provision session fails when PKCE method is not S256
Provision session fails when session registry is full
Provision session fails when all requested scopes are denied
Complete token exchange with valid auth code and verifier succeeds
test_cases.expected_output_description: Returns SessionId and session is activated

test_cases.description: Token exchange fails with unknown auth code
Token exchange fails with expired auth code
Token exchange fails with already-consumed auth code
Token exchange fails when code_verifier doesn't match challenge
Token exchange fails when associated session was removed
Revoke session with valid signature succeeds
test_cases.input_description: Valid session_id and matching Ed25519 signature

test_cases.description: Revoke session fails when session_id not in registry
Revoke session fails with invalid signature
Revoke session fails when already revoked
Dispatch get_proof request through full pipeline succeeds for Tier 1
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON-RPC request for signet_get_proof with Tier 1 attributes
test_cases.expected_output_description: JsonRpcResponse with GetProofResponse, matching request id

test_cases.description: Dispatch query request returns Tier1QueryResponse with attribute values
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON-RPC for signet_query with Tier 1 data

test_cases.description: Dispatch query request returns Tier2QueryResponse with conclusions only
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON-RPC for signet_query with Tier 2 data
test_cases.expected_output_description: JsonRpcResponse with Tier2QueryResponse containing only Conclusion newtypes

test_cases.description: Dispatch query request returns Tier3QueryResponse with pending id only
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON-RPC for signet_query with Tier 3 data
test_cases.expected_output_description: JsonRpcResponse with Tier3QueryResponse containing only PendingRequestId

test_cases.description: Dispatch request_capability returns PASETO v4 token
test_cases.expected_output_description: JsonRpcResponse with RequestCapabilityResponse containing PASETO token

test_cases.description: Dispatch negotiate_context creates new negotiation
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON-RPC for signet_negotiate_context with new negotiation_id
test_cases.expected_output_description: JsonRpcResponse with NegotiateContextResponse in Proposed state

test_cases.description: Dispatch check_status returns pending request status
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON-RPC for signet_check_status with known pending_request_id

test_cases.description: Dispatch fails with invalid JSON input
Dispatch fails with invalid JSON-RPC envelope
Dispatch fails with unregistered method name
Dispatch fails when params fail wire-to-domain conversion
Dispatch fails when session_id not in registry
Dispatch fails when session has expired
Dispatch fails when session is revoked
Dispatch fails with invalid Ed25519 signature
Dispatch fails when policy evaluator returns Deny
Dispatch suspends when policy evaluator returns Anomaly
Dispatch fails when policy evaluator returns RateLimited
Dispatch fails when any pipeline stage times out
Dispatch fails when crypto operation fails during tool execution
Dispatch fails when vault is unreachable during tool execution
Dispatch fails when audit record cannot be written
Dispatch fails when JSON-RPC contains unknown fields (deny_unknown_fields)
Validate session with valid non-expired non-revoked session and valid signature succeeds
test_cases.expected_output_description: Returns valid Session with updated last_activity_at

test_cases.description: Validate session fails when session_id not in registry
Validate session fails when session is expired
Validate session fails when session idle timeout exceeded
Validate session fails when session is revoked
Validate session fails when Ed25519 signature is invalid
Classify tier returns highest tier among requested attributes
test_cases.expected_output_description: Returns correct Tier based on attribute sensitivity

test_cases.description: Classify tier fails when credential_id not in vault
Classify tier fails when attribute not defined on credential
Classify tier fails when vault is unreachable
Evaluate policy returns Allow when all rules pass
Evaluate policy returns Deny when hard-deny rule matches
Evaluate policy returns Anomaly with PendingRequestId when anomaly detected
Evaluate policy returns RateLimited when rate limit exceeded
Evaluate policy fails on internal policy engine error
Evaluate policy fails on timeout (treated as deny)
Execute get_proof for Tier 1 generates cryptographic proof
test_cases.expected_output_description: GetProofResponse with proof bound to audience and nonce

test_cases.description: Execute get_proof fails when credential not found
Execute get_proof fails when attribute not on credential
Execute get_proof fails when crypto proof generation fails
Execute get_proof fails when vault unreachable
Execute get_proof suspends for Tier 3 attributes
Execute query for Tier 1 returns attribute values
Execute query for Tier 2 returns conclusions only
Execute query for Tier 3 returns PendingRequestId only
Execute query fails with invalid query expression
Execute query fails when vault unavailable
Execute query fails when vault data decryption fails
Execute request_capability generates PASETO v4 token
test_cases.expected_output_description: RequestCapabilityResponse with PASETO token and structured claims

test_cases.description: Execute request_capability fails with unrecognized type
Execute request_capability fails when scopes exceed session grants
Execute request_capability fails when token generation fails
Execute request_capability fails when tier access denied
Execute negotiate_context creates new negotiation in Proposed state
Execute negotiate_context advances existing negotiation state machine
Execute negotiate_context fails when negotiation_id not found
Execute negotiate_context fails when negotiation expired
Execute negotiate_context fails on invalid state transition
Execute negotiate_context fails when external agent unreachable
Execute negotiate_context fails when disclosures include Tier 3 attributes
Execute check_status returns current status of pending request
Execute check_status returns resolved status with resolution details
Execute check_status fails when pending_request_id not found
Execute check_status fails when request_type mismatch
Record audit entry writes durably and returns audit_record_id
Record audit fails when vault audit subsystem unreachable
Record audit fails when vault cannot durably write
Record audit fails when recording exceeds timeout
Shutdown server drains all requests cleanly
Shutdown server force-terminates after drain timeout
Shutdown fails when server is not running
Invariant: Tier 2 responses contain only Conclusion newtypes, never raw attribute values
assertions: Response type is Tier2QueryResponse
Response contains only Conclusion objects
No raw attribute_value fields present in response
Conclusion.statement is present but derived, not raw

test_cases.description: Invariant: Tier 3 responses contain only PendingRequestId, no data of any kind
assertions: Response type is Tier3QueryResponse
Only pending_request_id and notification_channel present
No attribute values, conclusions, or query results in response

test_cases.description: Invariant: Audit record is written atomically before response is returned; audit failure means response not returned
assertions: Audit write is called before response returned
If audit write fails, error response with audit_write_failed is returned
Tool response is never returned without corresponding audit entry

test_cases.description: Invariant: Anomaly decisions are never silently resolved or auto-approved
assertions: PolicyDecision.Anomaly always produces pending_request_id
Anomaly is never converted to Allow without human intervention
check_status for anomaly shows InReview or Pending until human resolves

test_cases.description: Invariant: Pipeline timeout equals deny (fail-secure); any stage timeout produces McpError.PipelineTimeout
assertions: Session validation timeout produces PipelineTimeout error
Tier classification timeout produces PipelineTimeout error
Policy evaluation timeout produces PipelineTimeout error
Tool execution timeout produces PipelineTimeout error
Audit recording timeout produces PipelineTimeout error

test_cases.description: Invariant: Every request checks session validity (expiry and revocation) before processing
assertions: Expired session produces session_expired error
Revoked session produces session_revoked error
Session check happens before tier classification, policy, or tool execution

test_cases.description: Invariant: All proofs are domain-bound and time-limited
assertions: Proof is bound to request.audience
Proof has expires_at set
Proof includes challenge nonce

test_cases.description: Invariant: One-way data flow vault->agent->service, never reverse
assertions: Query operation is read-only
No write-back to vault from query
No inbound write path from external services

test_cases.description: Invariant: No algorithm negotiation in any protocol; PKCE only S256, all algorithms fixed
assertions: Only S256 PKCE method is accepted
No algorithm negotiation field is processed
Non-S256 methods are rejected

test_cases.description: Invariant: Wire types use deny_unknown_fields; no extra fields accepted
assertions: Extra fields in JSON-RPC envelope cause rejection
Extra fields in tool params cause rejection

test_cases.description: Invariant: JSON-RPC dispatcher accepts only the five registered tool methods
assertions: signet_get_proof is accepted
signet_query is accepted
signet_request_capability is accepted
signet_negotiate_context is accepted
signet_check_status is accepted
Any other method name is rejected with unknown_method

test_cases.description: Invariant: HTTP+SSE transport requires TLS; plaintext HTTP is never accepted
assertions: HttpSse transport without TLS config fails
HttpSse transport with valid TLS succeeds

test_cases.description: Invariant: McpError Display never contains key material, session secrets, or raw vault data
assertions: Error messages do not contain hex strings longer than 32 chars
Error messages do not contain base64 encoded key material
Error messages do not contain session secrets

test_cases.description: Invariant: Negotiate context state is always cleaned up on session expiry or revocation
assertions: After revocation, negotiate_context_states for the session are empty
Expired sessions have negotiate_context_states pruned

test_cases.description: Invariant: Tier classification returns highest (most restrictive) tier among all attributes
assertions: If any attribute is Tier3, result is Tier3
If any attribute is Tier2 and none Tier3, result is Tier2
All Tier1 attributes return Tier1

test_cases.description: Edge case: SessionId must be 32-character hex-encoded 128-bit value
test_cases.input_description: Session ID with invalid hex format or wrong length

test_cases.description: Edge case: GetProofRequest nonce must be at least 16 characters
test_cases.input_description: GetProofRequest with nonce shorter than 16 characters

test_cases.description: Edge case: GetProofRequest audience must be non-empty
Edge case: Granted scopes are subset of requested intersected with policy-allowed
test_cases.input_description: Provision request with mixed valid and invalid scopes

test_cases.description: Edge case: NegotiateContextState only allows valid transitions
assertions: Proposed -> CounterProposed is valid
Proposed -> Accepted is valid
Proposed -> Rejected is valid
Completed -> any transition is invalid
Rejected -> any transition is invalid
Expired -> any transition is invalid

test_cases.description: Edge case: Session registry enforces max_sessions limit under concurrent access
test_cases.input_description: Multiple concurrent provision requests when registry is near capacity

test_cases.description: Edge case: Response id always matches request id
assertions: JsonRpcResponse.id matches JsonRpcRequest.id for every request

test_cases.description: Integration flow: provision -> token exchange -> dispatch tools -> revoke -> verify rejected
test_cases.input_description: Full lifecycle of session creation through revocation
assertions: Session provisioned successfully
Token exchange completes
Tool dispatch succeeds with active session
Session revoked successfully
Subsequent dispatch returns session_revoked error

test_cases.description: Integration flow: multi-step context negotiation from Proposed through Completed
test_cases.input_description: Multiple negotiate_context calls advancing state machine
assertions: First call creates Proposed state
Follow-up advances to CounterProposed or Accepted
Final step reaches Completed
